title: Varuvan Manikandan
desc: An ardent devotee of Lord Ayyappan narrates tales of various miracles performed by the Hindu deity where the Almighty tests the devotion of his followers.

title: Ulle Veliye
desc: A corrupt officer's life changes when a woman's sacrifice saves him from the authorities.

title: Policekaran Magal
desc: Janaki and Prabhu love each other but his father Rajagopal wants him to marry Mallika. In order to inherit Rajagopal's wealth, Prabhu disowns Janaki and agrees to get married to Mallika.

title: Ullathai Allitha
desc: Tired of his father's disciplinarian ways and to avoid marrying a girl chosen by the latter, Raja runs away to Ooty. There, he is hired as a driver by the man whose daughter he was supposed to marry.
